name: Pear & Parsnip Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine parsnips and 2 cups water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Cover and reduce heat. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Drain and rinse under cold water.
4. In a medium bowl, combine cooked parsnips, green onions, and 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons honey-yogurt dressing. Stir well.
5. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
6. Cut pears in half lengthwise, core, and slice thinly, keeping slices intact.
7. Brush cut sides with lemon juice.
8. Place one pear half on each of six plates, arranging slices to form a fan.
9. Top each pear half with 1/2 cup parsnip mixture and 1 tablespoon remaining honey-yogurt dressing.
10. Sprinkle with ground black pepper if desired.
